sectiondef.header: USB PD 3.1 Rev 1.6, Table 6-70 Counter Parameters
USB PD 3.1 Rev 1.6, Table 6-68 Time Values

briefdescription.para: USB-C Power Delivery API used for USB-C drivers.

detaileddescription.para: The information in this file was taken from the USB PD Specification Revision 3.0, Version 2.0
